description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a dense border of palm trees, creating a secluded and tropical atmosphere. The structure features a large, flat wooden roof and an expansive wooden deck area, with a visible swimming pool and sun loungers on one side. The exterior walls are predominantly white, accented by large glass windows and sliding doors that open onto the deck and pool area. The layout is open and linear, with the main living spaces oriented toward the pool and outdoor relaxation zones. The landscaping is lush, with palm trees forming a natural privacy barrier around the property. The overall design emphasizes indoor-outdoor living, blending contemporary architecture with resort-style amenities.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat wooden roof, surrounded by palm trees and featuring a pool and expansive deck. The design blends contemporary architecture with tropical landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, dense palm tree border, and partial view of the pool and deck.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the wooden roof, extensive deck, and the pool area at the far end.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the pool, sun loungers, and large glass doors opening to the deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the wooden roof, pool, and the wraparound palm tree landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass sliding doors and grouped windows facing the pool
